channel.title: sera on meorion
channel.description: Recent content in sera on meorion

item.title: Qs and As
item.description:
Charizard is the most potent of all the variations of the base charmander oeuvre and all its branches. that is not in question. We aren’t debating that.
But, it does bring up another question. and I think we have the answer
(updated: Jul-28th 2022, Jul-24th 2022, Jul-15th 2022. original 2022-06-25)

item.title: sera
item.description:
IN-PROGRESS One-pager Sera POV one pager sera working 200-500 words
~/Desktop/pix/momsleeptrace.png Sera was born in the wreckage of the sleeper star ship, Meridian. The ship collided with an undetected satellite in their destination solar system. She grew up looking at Annie. A girl lying motionless, face shiny, nose slightly wrinkled, honey colored hair in her stasis pod. Both of them under the watch of the Meridian’s AI, Joyce.
